{{Infobox concept
| name = Ragnarus Traveler
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Ragnarus [[Travelers]] are individuals linked to the ninth [[Territory]], known as Ragnarus or the [[Crimson Vault]]. These [[Travelers]] possess the ability to summon powerful weapons and can travel specifically back to [[Cana]], though they cannot open [[Gates]] to the [[Crimson Vault]] from within a [[Territory]]. The power associated with Ragnarus is described as warm, hungry, and sentient, often acting like a disembodied heart. A defining characteristic of these [[Travelers]] is the cost required to use their abilities; they frequently utilize the pain or blood of others to activate and fuel their weapons. In combat, a [[Traveler]] can consume enemies to sustain themselves, provided they are willing to pay the necessary price. While some [[Travelers]] serve as guards meant to intercept uninvited entities passing through Ragnarus [[Gates]], others may act as traitors or use their connection to the [[Territory]] for self-serving purposes.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] expects backup in the form of a pair of Ragnarus [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Ragnarus [[Travelers]] have a tendency to pay the prices for their weapons using other people.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Ragnarus Traveler]] can be found at the heart of the [[Crimson Vault]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin]] questions if Ragnarus [[Travelers]] will be grateful to [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]]'s brothers and sisters were Ragnarus [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] is a [[Ragnarus Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Ragnarus Traveler]] is an impossibly powerful combatant.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
